text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Happy birthdaaay, El! As a fellow friend who
dreams of captivating the world, I've prepared
the finest of all presents for you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Behold, your gift... is a trip around the world!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Wow! ...But wait, Pearl! I love your gift, but what
about my race tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Don't you worry about a thing! Who said you had
to travel to go on a trip around the world?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Believe in your potential! Trust yourself! Just
close your eyes and let your imagination take
flight. Now, El... go!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hear those crashing waves... Beautiful beaches,
yachts sailing about... Yes, we've arrived in
Auckland!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Whoosh! A frigid wind blows in from the
overgrown beech forest... We're in a fjord carved
out by an ancient glacier!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
All of a sudden, the cute kiwis appear! Tweet!
Tweet!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Kiwis?! But... Wow, I really feel like I'm in New
Zealand!
